output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q221150 wdt:P156 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q32096 ; wdt:P585 ?year
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
